description_text: Autopark678's STORE Item description Features: Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look Adhesive installation with some drilling by bodyshop, is easy to apply for most cars Modification&cutting required to fit properly Specification: Material: ABS Plastic Size: 66 x 13.5cm Color: Carbon Fiber Color Universal fit for vehicles Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Spoiler Cover 1 x Double Sided Tape 1 Set of Screwes. Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us 1.Item location:Guangdong,China Item will be shipped out receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging.
